hero.title: Restore your body's balance
hero.subtitle: Physiotherapy, osteopathy and massage therapy in a space designed for your wellbeing.
hero.image_alt: A Clinique Aura therapist gently places her hands on the shoulder of a smiling patient in a bright treatment room with ivory and light wood tones
hero.image_caption: Our therapists welcome you in a space designed for wellbeing

services.title: Three approaches, one shared goal
services.subtitle: Personalized follow-up for every patient, at your own pace.

physio.title: Physiotherapy
physio.description: Assessment and treatment of musculoskeletal injuries by recognized professionals.

osteo.title: Osteopathy
osteo.description: A global manual approach to restore mobility and relieve chronic tension.

massage.title: Massage therapy
massage.description: Release and drainage techniques to support recovery and relaxation.

testimonialsCta.title: Give your body room to breathe
testimonialsCta.subtitle: Our therapists welcome you Monday to Saturday. First consultation by appointment, personalized follow-up from the second session.
testimonialsCta.trust_line: No cancellation fee up to 24 hours before the appointment.

marie.quote: In three sessions I recovered mobility I thought I'd lost after my accident. The welcome matches the quality of care.
marie.author: Marie L.

julien.quote: My osteopath took the time to understand my desk-bound work. The results hold over time.
julien.author: Julien T.

sophie.quote: I've tried several clinics. Aura is the only one where I feel heard and never rushed.
sophie.author: Sophie R.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: Clinique Aura complies with Québec's Act 25 on the protection of personal information in the private sector.
privacy.data_body: Name, email, phone, clinical information (within the scope of therapeutic follow-up).
privacy.purposes_body: Appointment booking, contact form, clinical follow-up, anonymized usage analytics.
privacy.retention_body: Clinical records are kept for 10 years after the last visit. Navigation data is kept for 24 months maximum.
privacy.rights_body: You may request access, rectification or deletion of your data at any time by contacting our officer.

mentions.title: Legal notice
mentions.host_value: Vercel Inc., 340 S Lemon Ave #4133, Walnut, CA 91789, United States

cookies.banner_body: We use essential cookies to run the site. Analytics cookies are only enabled with your consent.
